mapper.insert: INSERT INTO geo.legal_regions ( code, name, full_name, level, parent_code, sido_code, sigungu_code, eupmyeondong_code, raw_status, is_active, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{region.code}, #{region.name}, #{region.fullName}, #{region.level}, #{region.parentCode}, #{region.sidoCode}, #{region.sigunguCode}, #{region.eupmyeondongCode}, #{region.rawStatus}, #{region.active}, #{region.syncedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, full_name = EXCLUDED.full_name, level = EXCLUDED.level, parent_code = EXCLUDED.parent_code, sido_code = EXCLUDED.sido_code, sigungu_code = EXCLUDED.sigungu_code, eupmyeondong_code = EXCLUDED.eupmyeondong_code, raw_status = EXCLUDED.raw_status, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, synced_at = EXCLUDED.synced_at, updated_at = now()

INSERT INTO geo.legal_region_sync_logs ( source, source_file_name, total_count, inserted_count, updated_count, deactivated_count, started_at, finished_at, status, error_message ) VALUES ( #{log.source}, #{log.sourceFileName}, #{log.totalCount}, #{log.insertedCount}, #{log.updatedCount}, #{log.deactivatedCount}, #{log.startedAt}, #{log.finishedAt}, #{log.status}, #{log.errorMessage} )
